meaning: n.[绾篯缁囨湁閲戦摱涓濇诞鑺辩殑,缁囬敠,閿︾紟
examples: She wore a green brocade dress and held a green parrot on her finger.
We will go to Yun Brocade Museum with the exchange students this coming summer holiday.
But the garment whose fate makes Indians clutch their brocade scarfs in terror is the kimono.
She wears a brocade blue dress, and her pale eyes are strangely distant and slightly uneven.
